name: replit-enterprise-rbac
description: Configure Replit Teams roles, SSO/SAML, custom groups, and organization-level access control. Use when setting up team permissions, configuring SSO, managing deployment access, or auditing organization security on Replit. Trigger with phrases like "replit SSO", "replit RBAC", "replit enterprise", "replit roles", "replit permissions", "replit SAML", "replit teams admin".
